zh.Snitterfield, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾斯尼特費爾德
zh.Harworth, Bassetlaw District, Nottingham: 英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾哈爾沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Thorley於1396年8月27日出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾斯尼特費爾德時，她的父親Robert Thorley36歲，母親Anne de la Pole24歲。她於1428年2月17日之前與Reginald West在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1433年11月24日在她的家鄉享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Thorley于1396年8月27日出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾斯尼特費爾德时，她的父亲Robert Thorley36岁，母亲Anne de la Pole24岁。她于1428年2月17日之前与Reginald West在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1433年11月24日在她的家乡享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thorley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Staffordshire): habitational name, in most cases probably a variant of Thornley , although there are places called Thorley (in Hertfordshire and in Lincolnshire), which could have contributed to the surname; these are also named from Old English thorn ‘thorn bush’ + lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’.

variants.name: Thawley
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Derbyshire): variant of   Thorley  .

variants.name: Thornley
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): habitational name from Thornley in Lancashire, and perhaps also from Thornyleigh near Heaton in Leek (Staffordshire) and Thornleigh in Huddersfield (Yorkshire). The Lancashire name derives from Old English thornede ‘thorny’ + lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. The other placenames derive from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ or thornig ‘thorny’ + lēah.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Thorley was born on 27 August 1396, in Snitterfield, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Thorley, was 36 and her mother, Anne de la Pole, was 24. She married Reginald West before 17 February 1428, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 24 November 1433, in her hometown, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Thorley est née le 27 août 1396, à Snitterfield, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Thorley, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Anne de la Pole, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Reginald West avant 17 février 1428, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 24 novembre 1433, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Thorley am 27. August 1396 in Snitterfield, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Thorley 36 und ihre Mutter Anne de la Pole 24. Sie hat vor 17. Februar 1428 in England Reginald West geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 24. November 1433 im Alter von 37 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Thorley è nata il il 27 agosto 1396 nel Snitterfield, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Thorley, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Anne de la Pole, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Reginald West prima del 17 febbraio 1428, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 24 novembre 1433, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Thorleyが1396年8月27日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアスニッテルフィールドで生まれた時，父Robert Thorleyは36歳，母Anne de la Poleは24歳であった。1428年2月17日以前にイギリスでReginald Westと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1433年11月24日に故郷で37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Thorley(이)가 1396년 8월 27일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 스니터필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Thorley(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne de la Pole(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1428년 2월 17일 이전 영국에서 Reginald West(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1433년 11월 24일 그녀의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.27 August 1396–24 November 1433: 27 de agosto de 1396–24 de novembro de 1433
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Thorley nasceu em 27 de agosto de 1396, em Snitterfield, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Thorley, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Anne de la Pole, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Reginald West antes 17 de fevereiro de 1428, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 24 de novembro de 1433, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Thorley родилась 27 августа 1396 г. в местности сниттирфиелд, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Thorley было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne de la Pole, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Reginald West перед 17 февраль 1428 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 24 ноября 1433 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 37 лет.

es.27 August 1396–24 November 1433: 27 de agosto de 1396–24 de noviembre de 1433
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Thorley nació el 27 de agosto de 1396, en Snitterfield, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Thorley, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Anne de la Pole, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Reginald West antes de 17 de febrero de 1428, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 24 de noviembre de 1433, en su pueblo, a la edad de 37 años.
